title: Place of executing notarial acts
doc_html:
§10.  Place of executing notarial acts

All notarial acts shall be made and executed at any place within the jurisdictional limits of the notary.

Amended by Acts 1974, No. 460, §1.
doc_text:
§10.  Place of executing notarial acts
All notarial acts shall be made and executed at any place within the jurisdictional limits of the notary.
Amended by Acts 1974, No. 460, §1.
